        </div>
        <div class="cl-item" onclick="clToggle(this,'cl-d4','bc-d4',4)">
          <div class="cl-box"><svg width="11" height="9" viewBox="0 0 11 9" fill="none"><path d="M1 4.5L4 7.5L10 1.5" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg></div>

        </div>
        <div class="cl-item" onclick="clToggle(this,'cl-d4','bc-d4',4)">
          <div class="cl-box"><svg width="11" height="9" viewBox="0 0 11 9" fill="none"><path d="M1 4.5L4 7.5L10 1.5" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg></div>
          <div class="cl-text"><div class="cl-name">採檢完成後，將標籤黏貼於福馬林瓶（直式）</div><div class="cl-note">菱形小瓶請貼<strong>直式標籤</strong>，方便掃描</div></div>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════
     A1 病人衛教
═══════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="step-panel" id="panel-a1">
  <div class="phase-banner phase-banner-after">
    <div class="banner-icon">🩺</div>
    <div class="banner-info">

      <div class="banner-title">病人衛教</div>
      <div class="banner-desc">加壓、平躺、傷口照護及異常回報</div>
    </div>
    <div class="banner-spacer"></div>
    <div class="banner-counter" id="bc-a1">0 / 5 完成</div>
  </div>

  <div class="step-card">
    <div class="step-card-header">
      <div class="step-badge">AFTER-01</div>
      <div><div class="step-card-title">術後衛教清單</div><div class="step-card-desc">逐項向病人說明並確認</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="step-card-body">
      <div class="checklist" id="cl-a1">
        <div class="cl-item" onclick="clToggle(this,'cl-a1','bc-a1',5)">
          <div class="cl-box"><svg width="11" height="9" viewBox="0 0 11 9" fill="none"><path d="M1 4.5L4 7.5L10 1.5" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg></div>
          <div class="cl-text"><div class="cl-name">加壓穿刺點 30–60 分鐘</div><div class="cl-note">凝血功能異常者（PLT &lt; 100 或 PT/APTT 異常）需加壓 <strong>≥ 1 小時</strong>，並密切觀察滲血</div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="cl-item" onclick="clToggle(this,'cl-a1','bc-a1',5)">
          <div class="cl-box"><svg width="11" height="9" viewBox="0 0 11 9" fill="none"><path d="M1 4.5L4 7.5L10 1.5" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg></div>
          <div class="cl-text"><div class="cl-name">術後平躺 60 分鐘</div><div class="cl-note">觀察穿刺部位有無血腫、滲血加劇或疼痛異常</div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="cl-item" onclick="clToggle(this,'cl-a1','bc-a1',5)">
          <div class="cl-box"><svg width="11" height="9" viewBox="0 0 11 9" fill="none"><path d="M1 4.5L4 7.5L10 1.5" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg></div>
          <div class="cl-text"><div class="cl-name">傷口 24–48 小時不可碰水</div><div class="cl-note">避免感染，洗澡請用防水貼膜或以毛巾擦拭</div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="cl-item" onclick="clToggle(this,'cl-a1','bc-a1',5)">
          <div class="cl-box"><svg width="11" height="9" viewBox="0 0 11 9" fill="none"><path d="M1 4.5L4 7.5L10 1.5" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg></div>
          <div class="cl-text"><div class="cl-name">告知病人異常狀況回報</div><div class="cl-note">如局部腫脹加劇、疼痛未減輕、發燒或穿刺點滲血時，請立即告知護理師</div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="cl-item" onclick="clToggle(this,'cl-a1','bc-a1',5)">
          <div class="cl-box"><svg width="11" height="9" viewBox="0 0 11 9" fill="none"><path d="M1 4.5L4 7.5L10 1.5" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg></div>
          <div class="cl-text"><div class="cl-name">確認病人已了解並無疑問</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="abox abox-teal" style="margin-top:.85rem">
        <div class="abox-icon">📌</div>
        <div>本案 PLT 89×10³/μL（偏低），加壓時間應延長至 <strong>≥ 1 小時</strong>，請特別向病人說明並記錄加壓開始時間。</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="step-action-row">
    <button class="btn btn-outline btn-sm" onclick="goStep('d8')">← 返回上一步</button>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:.6rem;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap">
      <div class="step-hint">💡 5 項全部確認後解鎖</div>
      <button class="btn btn-next" id="btn-a1-next" onclick="completeStep('a1','a2')" disabled>衛教完成，進入檢體送出 →</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

          <div class="cl-box"><svg width="11" height="9" viewBox="0 0 11 9" fill="none"><path d="M1 4.5L4 7.5L10 1.5" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg></div>
          <div class="cl-text"><div class="cl-name">所有病理組織檢體（福馬林瓶）</div><div class="cl-note">確認直式標籤 ＋ 瓶蓋易碎貼紙皆已貼妥</div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="cl-item" onclick="clToggle(this,'cl-a2','bc-a2',3)">
          <div class="cl-box"><svg width="11" height="9" viewBox="0 0 11 9" fill="none"><path d="M1 4.5L4 7.5L10 1.5" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg></div>
          <div class="cl-text"><div class="cl-name">病理組織委託單</div></div>

      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="step-action-row">
    <button class="btn btn-outline btn-sm" onclick="goStep('a1')">← 返回上一步</button>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:.6rem;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap">
      <div class="step-hint">💡 3 項確認後解鎖</div>
      <button class="btn btn-next" id="btn-a2-next" onclick="finishAll()" disabled>✅ 完成整個 BMA 流程</button>
    </div>
  </div>

    <div class="complete-icon">✅</div>

      包含檢查前準備、HIS Sign IN/OUT、檢體送檢及病人衛教。
    </div>
    <div class="complete-badge">BMA SOP COMPLETED ✓</div>
  </div>
  <div class="step-card">
    <div class="step-card-body" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.65rem">
      <div class="sec-title">重點摘要</div>
      <div class="abox abox-info"><div class="abox-icon">📋</div><div><strong>檢查前：</strong> 不需禁食 ｜ 平板電子同意書 ｜ 備品 14 項核對 ｜ HIS v4.0 病人核對（5項）</div></div>
      <div class="abox abox-teal"><div class="abox-icon">🖥</div><div><strong>HIS 流程：</strong> 取消非病理組織 V → 載入同意書 → 列印條碼 → 醫師代號 → 掃手圈 → Sign IN → Time Out → 採檢 → 掃手圈 → 件數 Enter → 刷標籤 → Sign OUT → 檢體確認 → 送檢作業 → 列印清單</div></div>
      <div class="abox abox-danger"><div class="abox-icon">🚨</div><div><strong>抽吸關鍵：</strong> 立即安撫病人，告知「短暫酸麻感很快過去，請保持不動」</div></div>
      <div class="abox abox-warning"><div class="abox-icon">🏷</div><div><strong>標籤：</strong> 003→小紫頭 ｜ 004→檢查單 ｜ C77-033+大紫頭 ｜ L72-278→深綠頭 ｜ 福馬林瓶貼直式標籤＋瓶蓋易碎貼紙</div></div>
      <div class="abox abox-success"><div class="abox-icon">🩺</div><div><strong>術後：</strong> 加壓 30–60 分（凝血異常 ≥1h）→ 平躺 60 分 → 傷口 24–48h 不碰水 → 異常立即回報</div></div>
      <button class="btn btn-teal btn-block" style="margin-top:.35rem" onclick="restartAll()">🔄 重新開始</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</main>
</div>

<!-- PAIN MODAL -->
<div class="modal-overlay" id="pain-modal">
  <div class="modal">
    <div class="modal-head">
      <div>
        <div class="modal-title">🩺 疼痛評估 — NRS 數字量表</div>
        <div style="font-size:.73rem;color:var(--gray500);margin-top:.15rem">請依病人反應選擇疼痛分數後確認</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:.7rem;color:var(--gray400);padding:0 .1rem;margin-bottom:.15rem">
      <span>0 無痛</span><span>5 中度</span><span>10 劇痛</span>
    </div>
    <div class="pain-scale">
      <button class="pb pb-0" onclick="selPain(0)">0</button>
      <button class="pb pb-1" onclick="selPain(1)">1</button>
      <button class="pb pb-2" onclick="selPain(2)">2</button>
      <button class="pb pb-3" onclick="selPain(3)">3</button>
      <button class="pb pb-4" onclick="selPain(4)">4</button>
      <button class="pb pb-5" onclick="selPain(5)">5</button>
      <button class="pb pb-6" onclick="selPain(6)">6</button>
      <button class="pb pb-7" onclick="selPain(7)">7</button>
      <button class="pb pb-8" onclick="selPain(8)">8</button>
      <button class="pb pb-9" onclick="selPain(9)">9</button>
      <button class="pb pb-10" onclick="selPain(10)">10</button>
    </div>
    <div id="pain-sel-text" style="text-align:center;font-size:.82rem;color:var(--gray500);min-height:1.3rem;margin-bottom:.85rem">請點選分數</div>
    <button class="btn btn-primary btn-block" id="pain-confirm" onclick="confirmPain()" disabled>確認記錄疼痛評估</button>

<!-- FLASH -->
<div class="flash" id="flash">
  <span class="flash-icon" id="flash-icon">⚠️</span>
  <div id="flash-msg"></div>
  <button class="flash-close" onclick="closeFlash()">知道了</button>
</div>

<script>
// ─── STATE ───────────────────────────────────────
let currentStep = 'b1';
const stepOrder = ['b1','b2','b3','d1','d2','d3','d4','d5','d6','d7','d8','a1','a2'];
const completedSteps = new Set();

// B3 HIS confirmed count
let b3HisCount = 0;
let b3ConsentChecked = false;

// D2 left panel progress
let d2Step = 0; // 0-4

// D3
let d3WristScanned = false;
let d3Checks = [false,false,false,false];

// D5
let d5Step = 0;

// D6
let d6CheckCount = 0;
let d6SignOutDone = false;

// D7
let d7Step = 0;

// Pain modal
let painScore = null;
let painCallback = null;

// D4 checklist
let d4Count = 0;

// ─── INIT ────────────────────────────────────────
window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  goStep('b1');
  updateSidebarCounts();
});

// ─── NAVIGATION ──────────────────────────────────
function goStep(id) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.step-panel').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.nav-item').forEach(n => n.classList.remove('active'));
  const panel = document.getElementById('panel-' + id);
  if (panel) panel.classList.add('active');
  const nav = document.getElementById('nav-' + id);
  if (nav) nav.classList.add('active');
  currentStep = id;
  updatePhaseIndicator(id);
  const mc = document.getElementById('main-content');
  if (mc) mc.scrollTop = 0;
  window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
}

function updatePhaseIndicator(id) {
  const pd = { before: document.getElementById('pd-before'), during: document.getElementById('pd-during'), after: document.getElementById('pd-after') };
  const lbl = document.getElementById('phase-label');
  Object.values(pd).forEach(d => { d.className = 'phase-dot'; });
  if (id.startsWith('b')) { pd.before.classList.add('before'); lbl.textContent = '檢查前'; }
  else if (id.startsWith('d')) { pd.during.classList.add('during'); lbl.textContent = '檢查中'; }
  else if (id.startsWith('a')) { pd.after.classList.add('after'); lbl.textContent = '檢查後'; }
  else { pd.after.classList.add('after'); lbl.textContent = '完成'; }
}

function completeStep(id, nextId) {
  completedSteps.add(id);
  const nn = document.getElementById('nn-' + id);
  if (nn) { nn.textContent = '✓'; nn.parentElement.classList.add('completed'); }
  updateSidebarCounts();
  if (nextId === 'done') { showDone(); return; }
  goStep(nextId);
}

function showDone() {
  document.querySelectorAll('.step-panel').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.nav-item').forEach(n => n.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('panel-done').classList.add('active');
  document.getElementById('progress-chip')?.remove();
}

function finishAll() {
  completeStep('a2', 'done');
}
function restartAll() { location.reload(); }

// ─── SIDEBAR COUNTS ──────────────────────────────
function updateSidebarCounts() {
  const before = ['b1','b2','b3'].filter(s => completedSteps.has(s)).length;
  const during = ['d1','d2','d3','d4','d5','d6','d7','d8'].filter(s => completedSteps.has(s)).length;
  const after  = ['a1','a2'].filter(s => completedSteps.has(s)).length;
  document.getElementById('sp-before').textContent = before + ' / 3 完成';
  document.getElementById('sp-during').textContent = during + ' / 8 完成';
  document.getElementById('sp-after').textContent  = after  + ' / 2 完成';
}

// ─── GENERIC CHECKLIST ───────────────────────────
function clToggle(el, clId, counterId, total) {
  el.classList.toggle('checked');
  const checked = document.querySelectorAll('#' + clId + ' .cl-item.checked').length;
  // Some counters are also used as hint text (d4)
  const cEl = document.getElementById(counterId);
  if (cEl) cEl.textContent = checked + ' / ' + total + ' 完成';

  // unlock next btn logic
  if (clId === 'cl-b1')  { if (checked >= total) unlockBtn('btn-b1-next'); }
  if (clId === 'cl-b2')  { if (checked >= total) unlockBtn('btn-b2-next'); }
  if (clId === 'cl-d4')  { d4Count = checked; if (checked >= total) unlockBtn('btn-d4-next'); }
  if (clId === 'cl-d8')  { if (checked >= total) unlockBtn('btn-d8-next'); }
  if (clId === 'cl-a1')  { if (checked >= total) unlockBtn('btn-a1-next'); }
  if (clId === 'cl-a2')  { if (checked >= total) unlockBtn('btn-a2-next'); }

  // B3 consent
  if (clId === 'cl-b3-consent') { b3ConsentChecked = el.classList.contains('checked'); checkB3Done(); }
}

function updateD6Counter(checked, total) {
  const el = document.getElementById('bc-d6');
  if (el) el.textContent = checked + ' / ' + total + ' 完成';
}

function unlockBtn(id) {
  const btn = document.getElementById(id);
  if (btn) { btn.disabled = false; btn.style.pointerEvents = ''; }
}

// ─── B3 HIS CONFIRM ──────────────────────────────
function confirmHisB3Done() {
  b3HisCount = 5;
  const confirmBtn = document.getElementById('btn-b3-his-confirm');
  confirmBtn.textContent = '✔ 已核對完成';
  confirmBtn.className = 'btn btn-done btn-block';
  confirmBtn.disabled = true;
  document.getElementById('b3-his-done-msg').style.display = 'flex';
  checkB3Done();
}
function checkB3Done() {
  const consentOk = document.querySelectorAll('#cl-b3-consent .cl-item.checked').length >= 1;
  if (consentOk && b3HisCount >= 5) {
    unlockBtn('btn-b3-next');
  }
}

// ─── D2 FLOW ─────────────────────────────────────
function d2Next(n) {
  const cur = document.getElementById('d2-l' + n);
  cur.classList.remove('fs-active'); cur.classList.add('fs-done');
  cur.querySelector('button').disabled = true; cur.querySelector('button').textContent = '✓ 完成';
  d2Step = n;
  if (n < 4) {
    const next = document.getElementById('d2-l' + (n+1));
    next.classList.add('fs-active');
    next.querySelector('button').disabled = false;
  } else {
    document.getElementById('d2-done-msg').style.display = 'flex';
    unlockBtn('btn-d2-next');
  }
}

// ─── D3 SIGN IN ──────────────────────────────────
function d3Next(n) {
  if (n === 1) {
    d3WristScanned = true;
    const r1 = document.getElementById('d3-r1');
    r1.classList.remove('fs-active'); r1.classList.add('fs-done');
    r1.querySelector('button').disabled = true; r1.querySelector('button').textContent = '✔ 已掃描';
    const r2 = document.getElementById('d3-r2'); r2.classList.add('fs-active');
    const items = document.getElementById('d3-items');
    items.style.opacity = '1'; items.style.pointerEvents = 'auto';
    // Enable Sign IN button directly after wristband scan
    document.getElementById('d3-signin-btn').disabled = false;
  }
}
function doSignIn() {
  document.getElementById('d3-signin-btn').textContent = '✔ Sign IN 已確定';
  document.getElementById('d3-signin-btn').className = 'btn btn-done btn-sm';
  document.getElementById('d3-signin-btn').disabled = true;
  document.getElementById('d3-pain-reminder').style.display = 'flex';
  document.getElementById('d3-done-msg').style.display = 'flex';
  unlockBtn('btn-d3-next');
}

// ─── D5 FLOW ─────────────────────────────────────
function d5Next(n) {
  const cur = document.getElementById('d5-s' + n);
  cur.classList.remove('fs-active'); cur.classList.add('fs-done');
  const btn = cur.querySelector('button'); btn.disabled = true; btn.textContent = '✓ 完成';
  d5Step = n;
  if (n < 3) {
    const next = document.getElementById('d5-s' + (n+1));
    next.classList.add('fs-active');
    const nb = next.querySelector('button'); if (nb) nb.disabled = false;
  } else {
    document.getElementById('d5-done-msg').style.display = 'flex';
    unlockBtn('btn-d5-next');
  }
}

// ─── D6 SIGN OUT ─────────────────────────────────
function unlockSignOut() {
  const btn = document.getElementById('btn-signout');
  btn.disabled = false; btn.style.pointerEvents = '';
}
function doSignOut() {
  d6SignOutDone = true;
  document.getElementById('btn-signout').textContent = '✔ Sign OUT 已確定';
  document.getElementById('btn-signout').className = 'btn btn-done btn-block';
  document.getElementById('btn-signout').disabled = true;
  document.getElementById('d6-pain-reminder').style.display = 'flex';
  document.getElementById('d6-done-msg').style.display = 'flex';
  unlockBtn('btn-d6-next');
}

// ─── D7 FLOW ─────────────────────────────────────
function d7Next(n) {
  const cur = document.getElementById('d7-p' + n);
  cur.classList.remove('fs-active'); cur.classList.add('fs-done');
  const btn = cur.querySelector('button'); btn.disabled = true; btn.textContent = '✓ 完成';
  d7Step = n;
  if (n < 4) {
    const next = document.getElementById('d7-p' + (n+1));
    next.classList.add('fs-active');
    const nb = next.querySelector('button'); if (nb) nb.disabled = false;
  } else {
    document.getElementById('d7-done-msg').style.display = 'flex';
    unlockBtn('btn-d7-next');
    showFlash('teal','🖨 送檢清單已列印！請連同檢體與委託單送至病理科。');
  }
}

// ─── PAIN MODAL ──────────────────────────────────
function openPainModal(cb) {
  painCallback = cb; painScore = null;
  document.querySelectorAll('.pb').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('sel'));
  document.getElementById('pain-sel-text').textContent = '請點選分數';
  document.getElementById('pain-confirm').disabled = true;
  document.getElementById('pain-modal').classList.add('open');
}
function selPain(n) {
  painScore = n;
  document.querySelectorAll('.pb').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('sel'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.pb')[n].classList.add('sel');
  const lbl = ['無痛','極輕微','輕微','輕度','輕中度','中度','中重度','重度','很嚴重','極嚴重','最劇烈'];
  document.getElementById('pain-sel-text').textContent = n + ' 分（' + lbl[n] + '）';
  document.getElementById('pain-confirm').disabled = false;
}
function confirmPain() {
  document.getElementById('pain-modal').classList.remove('open');
  if (painCallback) { painCallback(); painCallback = null; }
}

// ─── FLASH ───────────────────────────────────────
let flashTimer;
function showFlash(type, msg) {
  const el = document.getElementById('flash');
  const icon = document.getElementById('flash-icon');
  const msgEl = document.getElementById('flash-msg');
  msgEl.textContent = msg;
  el.className = 'flash';
  if (type === 'teal') { el.classList.add('flash-teal'); icon.textContent = '✅'; }
  else if (type === 'red') { el.classList.add('flash-red'); icon.textContent = '🚨'; }
  else { el.classList.add('flash-orange'); icon.textContent = '⚠️'; }
  el.classList.add('show');
  clearTimeout(flashTimer);
  flashTimer = setTimeout(() => el.classList.remove('show'), 7000);
}
function closeFlash() { document.getElementById('flash').classList.remove('show'); }
</script>

<!-- LIGHTBOX -->
<div class="lightbox-overlay" id="lightbox" onclick="closeLightbox()">
  <button class="lightbox-close" onclick="event.stopPropagation();closeLightbox()">✕</button>
  <img id="lightbox-img" src="" alt="" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">
  <div class="lightbox-caption" id="lightbox-caption"></div>
  <div class="lightbox-hint">點擊圖片以外區域或按 ESC 關閉</div>
</div>
<script>
function openLightbox(imgEl){
  const lb = document.getElementById('lightbox');
  const lbImg = document.getElementById('lightbox-img');
  const lbCap = document.getElementById('lightbox-caption');
  lbImg.src = imgEl.src;
  lbImg.alt = imgEl.alt;
  lbCap.textContent = imgEl.alt || '';
  lb.classList.add('open');
  document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
}
function closeLightbox(){
  document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.remove('open');
  document.body.style.overflow = '';
}
document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
  if(e.key === 'Escape') closeLightbox();
});
</script>

</body>
</html>
